entry.title: My Open Source Journey
entry.content: It's October again, Hacktoberfest time. Also time for me to reminisce about my personal learning journey that was so heavily influenced by open source.

entry.title: Redesigning a framework
entry.content: For the last few years, the core team of Cycle.js (André and me) has been redesigning the architecture and the developer experience of the framework. This February we finally found a solution to our problems that still stays true to the core ideas of the framework.
